comment: POC representative subset (specs/catalog-ingestion.md → Stage 1). Deterministic and checked in so the POC is reproducible: a few full sets for realistic search spread plus a layout menagerie by explicit printing id. all_parts relation targets are pulled automatically by the pipeline's closure pass.

cards.note: normal + all_parts combo links — Lightning Bolt (msc 806)
meld — Bruna, the Fading Light (inr 14); closure pulls Gisela + Brisela
battle (Scryfall now types these transform) — Invasion of Zendikar (mom 194)
emblem — Teferi, Hero of Dominaria Emblem (tdom 16)
checklist card (layout token, collector CH1) — Core Set 2019 Checklist (tm19 CH1)
